name: softjunk-lead-kit
description: Dependency-free local CLI and MCP checkout tools for the SoftJunk 5 USD PayPal lead follow-up handoff.

scripts.cli:smoke: node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js doctor --json && node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js kit --json && node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js pay --mode kit --json
scripts.try:rescue: node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js rescue --business "roofing contractor" --service "roof estimate" --source estimate --need "unanswered estimate" --tone direct --next quote --json
scripts.try:send: node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js send --business "med spa" --service consultation --source DM --need "quiet inquiry"
